industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Beijing Jingneng Power Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Jingneng Power Co., Ltd. generates and distributes electricity in China. It generates electricity from coal and thermal resources. The company is also involved in the steam and heat supply activities. Beijing Jingneng Power Co., Ltd. is based in Beijing, China. Beijing Jingneng Power Co., Ltd. was formerly a subsidiary of Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Limited.
